items.title: 'Legend': Players, coaches mourn Bobby Cox, 84
items.summary: On Saturday, MLB players and coaches remembered late manager Bobby Cox, who died at 84.
items.author: Alden Gonzalez

items.title: Phils remove Harper in first inning with migraine
items.summary: First baseman Bryce Harper, who has played in all 40 games this season, was removed by the Philadelphia Phillies in the bottom of the first inning of his team's 9-3 win over the Colorado Rockies on Saturday night with what the team said was a migraine.

items.title: Guardians land Gold Glove C Bailey from Giants
items.summary: The Guardians have acquired catcher Patrick Bailey from the Giants in return for the No. 29 pick in this year's MLB draft and pitching prospect Matt Wilkinson.
items.author: Jeff Passan

items.title: Twins RHP Bradley out with pectoral inflammation
items.summary: Twins right-hander Taj Bradley was placed on the 15-day injured list Saturday with right pectoral inflammation, retroactive to Wednesday.

items.title: Giants ace Webb heads to IL with knee bursitis
items.summary: Giants starter Logan Webb has been put on the 15-day injured list Saturday because of right knee bursitis after struggling with knee discomfort in his last start, a 10-5 loss to the San Diego Padres.

items.title: Brewers' Lockridge to IL after slamming into wall
items.summary: Brewers outfielder Brandon Lockridge has been placed on the injured list after he crashed into the side wall while chasing a foul ball.

items.title: White Sox scratch OF Benintendi (neck) from lineup...
items.summary: White Sox outfielder Andrew Benintendi, 31, slated to serve as the designated hitter in what turned out to be a 6-1 win over the Seattle Mariners on Saturday, was scratched from the lineup because of neck stiffness.

items.title: ⚾ Looking back: Kerry Wood's masterful 20-K day
items.summary: Wood, Hall of Famer Craig Biggio and others look back to when the Cubs phenom owned the zone and tied the single-game strikeout record.

items.title: Bobby Cox Passes Away
items.summary: The Braves announced that longtime manager Bobby Cox passed away at age 84. Cox led the Braves to the 1995 World Series title, and his 2504 wins rank fourth on the all-time list for managerial victories. As per the team’s official release to media…. “Bobby was a favorite among al
items.author: Mark Polishuk

items.summary: Orioles infielder Jackson Holliday is expected to start at third base for Double-A Chesapeake on Sunday. It’ll be his third professional appearance at the hot corner. Holliday is working his way back from a hamate bone fracture. The 22-year-old has been almost exclusively a secon

items.title: Dodgers Reinstate Blake Snell Saturday
items.summary: May 9: Snell was officially activated to start against Atlanta. He’ll take the roster spot of right-hander Brock Stewart, who’s heading back to the injured list, this time with a bone spur in his foot. Stewart began the season on the IL as he recovered from shoulder surgery. The
items.author: Darragh McDonald

items.title: Mariners To Reinstate Bryce Miller, Adjust Rotation
items.summary: Right-hander Bryce Miller will make his Mariners season debut on Wednesday against the Astros, reports Ryan Divish of the Seattle Times. Miller opened the year on the injured list after straining an oblique in the spring. Divish adds that Seattle will initially go to a six-man ro
items.author: Charlie Wright

items.title: Giants Place Logan Webb On 15-Day IL, Recall Trevor McDonald
items.summary: Giants right-hander Logan Webb is heading to the injured list with right knee bursitis, the team announced. Fellow righty Trevor McDonald is coming back up to the big leagues. The Webb move is retroactive to May 6. San Francisco expects the ace to return when he’s first eligible,
items.author: Charlie Wright

items.author: Mark Polishuk

items.title: Astros Claim Rhylan Thomas
items.summary: The Astros have claimed outfielder Rhylan Thomas off waivers from the Mariners, as announced by both teams. Houston moved right-hander Hunter Brown from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day IL in order to clear space for Thomas on the 40-man roster. The Mariners designated Thoma

items.summary: The Rays announced that they have selected Aaron Brooks‘ contract from Triple-A Durham. Outfielder Justyn-Henry Malloy was designated for assignment to open up a 40-man roster spot for Brooks, and right-hander Mason Englert was optioned to Triple-A in the corresponding 26-man ros
